input.content:
# Eval trace source note

fixture_files_snapshot..eval-fixtures/task.sh:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path

path = Path("docs/zh/index.md")
text = path.read_text()
path.write_text(text.replace("search:\n  exclude: true", "search:\n  exclude: false", 1))
PY

**Wrote the source documentation note** — Created `docs/eval_trace_source_note.md` with a brief note that sits outside the generated translated docs. This file is new (untracked in git) and doesn't interfere with any existing generated content.

**Verified no side effects** — Confirmed that none of the generated translated docs (`ja/index.md`, `ko/index.md`, `zh/index.md`) were modified during this process.
